title: TD15 2UZ, Simpsons Malt Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/GP3932PL/V007
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Simpsons Malt Limited   Installation name: Tweed Valley Maltings   Permit number: EPR/GP3932PL/V007   "
